title: TODDLER TUMMY TIME PLAYGROUPS - 211info
text: FAMILY NURTURING CENTER JACKSON COUNTY TODDLER TUMMY TIME PLAYGROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a weekly playgroup for parents and caregivers to come together and learn learn about child development, how to build early attachments, and how to work through parenting struggles. 825 E Main Street Suite A Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Parents or caregivers with babies age 0-9 months Hours: Tuesday 1:45pm-3:45pm Email (541) 779-5242 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 779-5242 Main phone Main phone (541) 779-5242 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to enroll in the program FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of 5th Avenue and N Oakdale Avenue Services: Child Development Classes Children's Play Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RELIEF NURSERY MATERIAL GOODS - DIAPERS MATERIAL GOODS - LITTLE SPROUTS CLOTHING SWAP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
